prompt: Throughout this library there is a canonical way to make a fresh, unfitted duplicate of an estimator that keeps its configuration but drops everything learned from data. Where is that duplication helper, and where is the mixin that defines how an estimator reports the configuration the helper copies?

rubric.answer_shape: one helper function, one foundational estimator class

evidence.claim: produces an unfitted duplicate keeping configuration
defines how configuration is reported and copied

adjudication.notes: Two independent passes selected the same anchors; no disagreement to resolve.
